task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'nature' vocabulary directory in the Nuxeo Administration panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Nuxeo Administration panel, specifically the Vocabularies or Directories section, with the 'nature' directory selected or being viewed.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Memorandum' entry to the vocabulary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the creation form or the vocabulary list containing a new entry with ID 'memorandum' and Label 'Memorandum'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Policy Brief' entry to the vocabulary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the creation form or the vocabulary list containing a new entry with ID 'policy_brief' and Label 'Policy Brief'.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Regulatory Filing' entry to the vocabulary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the creation form or the vocabulary list containing a new entry with ID 'regulatory_filing' and Label 'Regulatory Filing'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Annual Report 2023' document in the Projects workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Nuxeo document view for 'Annual Report 2023' located within the Projects workspace.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Nature' metadata field of the document to 'Regulatory Filing'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document's edit form or properties view with the 'Nature' field successfully set to 'Regulatory Filing'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo Web UI to add vocabulary entries
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Nuxeo web interface in a browser to add the entries, rather than using terminal commands (like curl to the Nuxeo API) or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo Web UI to update document metadata
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent edits the document properties through the Nuxeo web interface, not via terminal scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual 'Annual Report 2023' document
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Nuxeo document interface for 'Annual Report 2023' being modified, not a mock-up, local text file, or renamed dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding three custom entries to the 'nature' vocabulary directory in Nuxeo: 1) ID: 'memorandum', Label: 'Memorandum'; 2) ID: 'policy_brief', Label: 'Policy Brief'; 3) ID: 'regulatory_filing', Label: 'Regulatory Filing'. The target document is 'Annual Report 2023' located in the Projects workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023). Its 'Nature' metadata field must be updated to 'Regulatory Filing' (which corresponds to the ID 'regulatory_filing' in the backend). These entries are custom and not present in a default Nuxeo installation.
